subject: feat(structure): add snap-to-fit button for contained images
body:
Users can now click "Snap to Fit Image" in the Structure tab to
automatically adjust a cell's boundary so a contained image fills
the cell with no empty space and no cropping. The button appears
when a cell has an image set to "contain" fit mode.

The snap direction is determined by comparing the image's aspect
ratio to the cell's: wider images adjust the section boundary
(row height / column width), narrower images adjust the subdivision
boundary (cell width / cell height).

Image natural dimensions are now stored on upload for the calculation.
A fallback async load handles images uploaded before this feature.

Tags: structure, media, images, layout
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cell-image-sizing
Semver: minor
